title: PairCertBundle
description: Response body for POST /api/pair/claim — issued client cert + CA chain + JWT

client_id.description: UUID of the newly paired client (sub claim in JWT)

cert.description: PEM-encoded client leaf certificate (ECDSA P-256, 90-day validity per REQ-010)

ca_bundle.description: PEM-encoded CA root certificate (so client can verify bridge mTLS handshakes). 5-year validity per REQ-009.

jwt.description: JWT signed with bridge's HMAC key. Claims: sub=client_id, iss=bridge_id, exp=now+90d, iat=now.

expires_at.description: Unix epoch — cert NotAfter (90 days from issue per REQ-010). Client should re-pair before this date.

bridge_id.description: UUID of the issuing bridge (iss claim in JWT). Client should verify subsequent mTLS handshakes match.
